channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Tech leaders' message to Biden
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gen Z and Millennial social media accounts are ripe for the taking and this doesn’t surprise me
item.description: ‘Nearly half’ of Gen Z and Millennial respondents in 20,000-strong Yubico survey claim to have been victims of breaches.
item.dc:creator: luke.hughes@futurenet.com (Luke Hughes), TechRadar

item.title: Australian Open LIVE: tennis stream, cheapest deals, schedule, watch every match online, draw
item.description: Keen to watch the Australian Open 2025? Here are the best streams, the cheapest prices and how to watch every round from Melbourne as Jannik Sinner, Casper Ruud, Aryna Sabalenka and Novak Djokovic shoot for the title.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn will launch on Sunday—initiating Bezos’s challenge to SpaceX
item.description: Jeff Bezos‘s Blue Origin is set for an inaugural launch of its giant New Glenn rocket on Sunday, a long-awaited first leap to Earth orbit that sets up one of the biggest challenges yet to industry dominance enjoyed by Elon Musk‘s SpaceX.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Industrial routers are being hit by zero-days from new Mirai botnets
item.description: A new botnet, based on the dreaded Mirai, is actively assimilating devices, including smart home gadgets and industrial routers.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Zuckerberg says Biden officials would 'scream,' 'curse' at Meta team over COVID takedown requests
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said Biden administration officials would “scream” and “curse” at his employees when they disagreed with the government’s takedown requests over pandemic-related content.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: IRS ‘prepared’ for 2025 filing season, but potential spending cuts loom for the agency
item.description: For the 2025 tax filing season, the IRS is expanding several modernization efforts. But potential budget cuts on the table could curtail those efforts. The post IRS ‘prepared’ for 2025 filing season, but potential spending cuts loom for the agency first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: Prime Video's use of AI, Next Gen Stats on NFL games is helping viewers understand the game better
item.description: CULVER CITY, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams defense appeared to be content to drop back in coverage and prevent San Francisco’s Brock Purdy from completing a Hail Mary on the final play of their Thursday night game on Dec. 12. The broadcast on Amazon Prime Video saw it differently, though.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: From AI assistants to holographic displays, automakers showcase in-cabin experiences at CES
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Interior lighting aimed at reducing motion sickness. Shiny holographic dashboards displayed on windshields. And AI-powered voice assistants paired with infotainment systems to keep you company on long drives.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sony PlayStation is adding smell—yes, you read that right—to its games
item.description: Sony has unveiled a new gaming system that could allow PlayStation players to sniff their way through games like The Last of Us. Unveiled at CES 2025, the Future Immersive Entertainment Concept (FIEC) features a huge, room-size setup designed to push the boundaries of immersive gaming.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Zuckerberg met with Trump before ending fact-checking program: GOP senator
item.description: Sen. Markwayne Mullin (R-Okla.) said Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg met with President-elect Trump a day ahead of announcing the social media network will eliminate its fact-checking program to prioritize free speech.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Now, you can create a digital copy of your personality in just two hours
item.description: Researchers at Google Deepmind and Stanford University have concluded that a two-hour interview is sufficient to create a realistic AI copy with the same personality as the interviewee.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Uncertainty over Trump’s electric vehicle policies clouds 2025 forecast for carmakers
item.description: S&P Global Mobility expects global sales of 15.1 million battery electric vehicles in 2025, which would mark a 30% jump. Battery electric vehicles are expected to make up 16.7% of the market share for light vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Meloni says Italy is exploring deals on telecoms security, but denies private talks with Musk
item.description: ROME (AP) — Italy’s Premier Giorgia Meloni said Thursday that her government is in talks with several private companies, including Elon Musk’s SpaceX, over the country’s telecoms security system, but denied having discussed the issue privately with Musk. “I never talked about this with Musk.
item.dc:creator: GIADA ZAMPANO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 4 in 10 companies planning job cuts due to AI: Survey
item.description: Companies across the globe, at least 4 in 10, are likely to cut jobs as artificial intelligence (AI) continues to advance, new research shows.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: CompTIA bolsters penetration testing certification
item.description: CompTIA recently upgraded its PenTest+ certification program to educate professionals on cybersecurity penetration testing with training for artificial intelligence (AI), scanning and analysis, and vulnerability management, among other things.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: ByteDance's Lemon8 gains traction amid TikTok ban threat as creators push the app
item.description: Hearing a lot about Lemon8 lately? You’re not the only one. Amid a looming U.S. ban on TikTok, content creators have been pushing the platform's sister app.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Oracle offers price-performance boost with Exadata X11M update
item.description: The new version of Oracle’s Exadata platform, X11M, is now generally available, and promises improved performance on generative AI tasks such as retrieval augmented generation (RAG) for the same price as the old version.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI detects ovarian cancer better than human doctors: Study
item.description: AI based models achieved an accuracy rate of 86% for detecting ovarian cancer, compared to 82% for human experts.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: FAA cancels public meeting on SpaceX due to Carter Day of Mourning
item.description: A day of public meetings scheduled in South Texas on SpaceX's Starship launches has been canceled due to National Day of Mourning for former President Jimmy Carter's death.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, NewsNation
